title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 9.030 - Governor to proclaim Jefferson Day
text:
9.030.  Governor to proclaim Jefferson Day. — The governor shall annually issue a proclamation setting apart April thirteenth as "Jefferson Day", and recommending that it be observed by the people with appropriate exercises in the public schools and otherwise to the end that the memory of the public service and the humanitarian principles of Thomas Jefferson may be perpetuated.
(RSMo 1939 § 15314, A.L. 1957 p. 725)
